description: Landing-page about the FarmThru CSF round with no safe-harbour reference anywhere — must fail ADV-001 under the universal-channel gate (2026-04-27 founder directive). Confirms the rule fires on LPs not just emails.
text:
Own a piece of regen-ag

FarmThru opens its CSF round on Birchal on 23 June 2026. Place a small refundable deposit to lock in early access when the round opens.

100% refundable. No obligation to invest.
